name: ai-signal-scraper
description: Surface emerging, not-yet-mainstream AI tech news from arXiv, HN, Reddit, GitHub & Hugging Face — ranked locally with Ollama.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Runs SSH commands against a configured host; do not act on settings from an untrusted folder.

aiSignal.sshHost.description: Host/IP of the Jetson running the collector (default = USB-network address).

aiSignal.sshUser.description: Linux username on the Jetson (required). Key-based SSH must be set up.

aiSignal.remoteDir.description: Path to the engine project on the Jetson.

aiSignal.remotePython.description: Python interpreter on the Jetson, relative to remoteDir (or absolute).

aiSignal.sinceHours.description: Only rank items first seen within this many hours.

aiSignal.topOnStartup.description: Automatically fetch the latest ranking when VS Code starts (zero-click signal).

aiSignal.openOnStartup.description: On startup, also open the digest preview (off = just update the status bar).

aiSignal.refreshMinutes.description: Silently refresh the badge + digest every N minutes so an open preview stays live and a failed startup fetch self-heals (0 = off). Default matches the Jetson's 20-min collect cron.

aiSignal.webPort.description: Port of the local web view served by scripts/serve.py on this machine. 'Open web view' opens http://127.0.0.1:<port>.
